scripts.dev: npm run build -w @mills/game && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @mills/server" "npm run dev -w @mills/web"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @mills/game && npm run dev -w @mills/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @mills/game && npm run dev -w @mills/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mills/game && npm run build -w @mills/server && npm run build -w @mills/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @mills/game && npm run build -w @mills/web
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w @mills/game && npm run build -w @mills/server
